name: tokentopper
description: How much are you really shipping with AI? tokentopper reads your local usage across coding CLIs (Claude Code + Codex, more coming), scores a Fancy AI Usage Index, tells you your tier on the tokenmaxxing ladder, signs a tamper-evident signed.json, and ranks you at openfactoryai.com/tools/tokentopper. Private by default; only counts, models, and dates ever leave your machine, never prompts or code.
author: Kalmantic
